Types

GithubFileResponse = object
  name*, path*, sha*: string
  size*: int64
  url*, html_url*, git_url*, download_url*: string
  content*: string
RemoteSource = object
  apikey*: string
SourceType = enum
  Github = "github_com", Gitlab = "gitlab_com"

Procs

proc download(client: RemoteSource; path, tmpPath: string;
              args: seq[string] = @[]): bool {....raises: [KeyError, ValueError,
    HttpRequestError, LibraryError, Exception, OSError, SslError, IOError,
    TimeoutError, ProtocolError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Download a file from remote path and returns the local path to tmp file 
proc getFileContent(client: RemoteSource; res: Response): GithubFileResponse {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getRemoteEndpoints(src: SourceType): TableRef[string, string] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getRemotePath(rs: RemoteSource; path: string; args: varargs[string]): string {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc httpGet(client: RemoteSource; path: string; args: seq[string] = @[]): Response {....raises: [
    KeyError, ValueError, HttpRequestError, LibraryError, Exception, OSError,
    SslError, IOError, TimeoutError, ProtocolError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc initRemoteSource(pkgrHomeDir: string; source: SourceType = Github): RemoteSource {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, OSError, IOError], tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
    ExecIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
